description: Unified golden dataset for runtime RAG evaluation (post-ingest). Fact-based scoring, not full-string match.
philosophy: Like RAGAS / NVIDIA RAG benchmarks: measure fact recall, optional coverage, and precision (no off-topic digressions). expected_answer is reference only.

scoring.facts_required: Must appear (loose match). recall = hits/total. Pass if recall ≥ required_recall_threshold (default 0.6).
scoring.facts_optional: Bonus facts (Development Guide, dual use, …). Never fails the case. optional_recall reported.
scoring.facts_forbidden: Must NOT appear in the synthesized answer (precision). Skipped on raw retrieval dumps. Aliases: must_not_include.
scoring.expected_facts: Legacy alias of facts_required (kept in sync).
scoring.source_pages: Soft: if pages appear in evidence, at least one expected page must overlap.
scoring.should_refuse: Synthesized answers must use not-found / insufficient language.

backends.router: Scores required facts on evidence pack (retrieval coverage). Forbidden not applied.
backends.agent+llm: Scores required/optional/forbidden on the final answer (answer quality + precision).

fields.id: unique case id (F###, B###, L###, C###, S###, MH###, NF###, EC###)
fields.question: user question
fields.expected_answer: human reference only (not used for exact match)
fields.facts_required: core facts that must be covered (primary pass criterion)
fields.facts_forbidden: off-topic / digression facts that lower precision if present in answer
fields.source_pages: pages that should be retrieved (1-indexed PDF pages)
fields.should_refuse: true if model should abstain / say not in document
